foodServiceApplicability: All commercial and institutional food preparation businesses in Austin must have an Austin Water-approved grease interceptor unless a variance applies.
interceptorType: Grease interceptor or grease trap sized and approved through Austin Water plan review.
pumpOutFrequency: Austin City Code Section 15-10-197 requires complete cleaning at least once every three months, or sooner when grease and solids reach the 50 percent trigger.
manifestRequirement: Trip ticket manifest documentation must be followed and retained for up to three years.
submissionMethod: Coordinate inspections and pretreatment paperwork through Austin Water Industrial Waste staff.
enforcementNote: Failure to maintain the device or manifest trail can trigger pretreatment notices, escalation, and potential service consequences.
